result.summary: Found 1 major issue: the small print/terms text section has significant readability and visibility problems that impact user comprehension and legal compliance.

issues.description: The small print/terms text above 'SCROLL DOWN' is cramped, partially illegible, and appears to have text overflow or clipping issues. Multiple lines of text run together without proper spacing, making it difficult or impossible to read the important legal information and bonus terms.
issues.suggestion: Increase font size, improve line-height spacing, ensure proper text wrapping, and verify all text is fully visible within the container. Consider breaking terms into multiple lines or a separate expandable section. Ensure sufficient color contrast and readability for all legal/terms content.
